## TKO closing consideration — February 28, 2025 Form 8-K

| Component | Consideration issued | Stated value | Form of consideration | Valuation basis |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| Base closing consideration | **Approximately 26.1 million TKO Common Units**, plus an equivalent number of TKO Class B shares | **$3.25 billion** | Entirely equity | 25-trading-day VWAP ending **October 23, 2024**, the agreement date |
| Purchase-price adjustment | **Approximately 400,000 additional TKO Common Units**, plus an equivalent number of TKO Class B shares | **$50 million** | Settled in equity | Same 25-trading-day VWAP ending October 23, 2024 |
| Approximate total, including adjustment | **Approximately 26.5 million TKO Common Units**, plus approximately 26.5 million corresponding Class B shares | **Approximately $3.30 billion** | Equity; no cash consideration stated | Agreement-date VWAP, not February 28, 2025 closing-date market value |

### Relevant quoted language

The base consideration is described in Item 2.01:

> “At the effective time of the Transactions … the EDR Parties contributed, assigned, conveyed, delivered and transferred to TKO the Transferred Businesses, **in exchange for approximately 26.1 million TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $3.25 billion (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024), and subscribed for an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock** (the ‘Closing Consideration’).”

The purchase-price adjustment is described as follows:

> “The Closing Consideration is also subject to a **purchase price adjustment to be settled in equity consisting of approximately four hundred thousand TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $50 million (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024) and an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock**.”

### Key conclusions

- **Exact unit count:** The closing 8-K does **not** disclose an exact number. It reports only:
  - “approximately 26.1 million” base units; and
  - “approximately four hundred thousand” adjustment units.
- **Cash consideration:** None is identified. Both the base consideration and adjustment are described as **equity**, with the adjustment expressly “to be settled in equity.”
- **Equity structure:** For every TKO Common Unit issued, Endeavor subscribed for a corresponding share of **TKO Class B Common Stock**.
- **Total stated consideration:** Approximately **$3.30 billion**, represented by approximately **26.5 million units**, if the disclosed $50 million adjustment is added to the $3.25 billion base amount.
- **Value measurement:** The stated dollar values are based on the **25-trading-day VWAP ending October 23, 2024**, when the Transaction Agreement was signed. They are **not** based on TKO’s February 28, 2025 closing-date share price or close-date market value.
- Consequently, the filing does not provide the actual market value of the issued equity as of closing.

### Relevant language

Item 2.01 states:

> “The Closing Consideration is also subject to a **purchase price adjustment to be settled in equity consisting of approximately four hundred thousand TKO Common Units, having an aggregate value of $50 million (based on the volume-weighted average sales price of TKO PubCo Class A Common Stock for the twenty five trading days ending on October 23, 2024)** and **an equivalent number of corresponding shares of TKO PubCo Class B Common Stock**.”

## Key conclusions

- **Exact unit count:** The closing 8-K does **not** disclose an exact unit count. It uses:
  - “**approximately 26.1 million**” TKO Common Units; and
  - “**approximately four hundred thousand**” additional units for the adjustment.
- **Total stated consideration:** Approximately **26.5 million TKO Common Units**, with an equal number of corresponding Class B shares, carrying a combined stated value of **$3.30 billion**.
- **Cash versus equity:** The disclosed consideration and adjustment were **equity**, not cash. The 8-K expressly says the adjustment is “**to be settled in equity**” and identifies no cash consideration.
- **Valuation date:** The $3.25 billion and $50 million figures are based on the **25-trading-day VWAP ending October 23, 2024**, which was the Transaction Agreement date—not TKO’s market price on the **February 28, 2025 closing date**.
- **Class B shares:** The corresponding Class B shares should not be treated as additional dollar consideration on top of the TKO Common Units; the filing describes them as corresponding shares issued in an equivalent number.
- **Post-closing ownership:** The explanatory note adds:
  
  > “As of the consummation of the Transactions, the Company and its subsidiaries collectively own **approximately 61% of the voting interests of TKO PubCo**.”
